headline: Virtana Deal Highlights Dell AI Factory Adoption And Investor AI Expectations
summary: Virtana has launched an enterprise observability platform tailored for Dell AI Factory environments. The platform is designed to increase visibility and performance across Dell’s AI infrastructure stack for enterprise users. The integration expands the ecosystem of third-party tools built around Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) AI offerings. Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) is drawing fresh attention to its AI infrastructure efforts as Virtana rolls out an observability platform specifically for...
